en: ♪ So healthy in his body and in mind
♪ He's a well-respected man of our town
♪ We know him and this ain't so concerning Hey, Blake.
ko: ♪ 우리는 그를 알고 걱정할 필요 없어, 헤이, 블레이크.

en: I swiped it from his Rancic's lawn.
Wow, your shorts are like, especially gold today.
ko: 와, 오늘 너의 반바지가 특히 금색이네.

en: My mom uses color-safe bleach. Go Carol. I'll tell her.
ko: 우리 엄마는 색상 안전 표백제를 사용해. 고마워, 캐롤. 그녀에게 말할게.

en: When I see them all running like that
with their things bouncing around in their shorts,
I always picture them naked, even if I don't want to.
ko: 원치 않더라도 항상 그들이 나체인 모습이 떠올라.

en: All I see is pork swords.
ko: 내가 보는 건 다 돼지 검둥이야.

en: I'm supposed to be running. So guess what?
ko: 나는 뛰어야 해. 그래서 뭐라고 생각해?

en: What? I don't know. I'm pregnant.
